departure_notes: 10-7 gate/ramp/taxi: primary gates 75, 80, 81; international terminal/apron is on the south side of the airport.
10-7 startup/enroute clearance: contact Brisbane Delivery 15 minutes before target off time for pushback/start-up approval; route clearance may be issued during initial Brisbane Delivery contact.
10-7 pushback/ramp: contact Ground for pushback; two-person pushback procedures are in effect; minimum thrust must be maintained in the ramp area to avoid jet blast damage.
10-7 parking: various A-VDGS parking systems are in use.
arrival_notes: 10-7 gate/ramp/taxi: primary gates 75, 80, 81; international terminal/apron is on the south side of the airport.
10-7 parking: various A-VDGS parking systems are in use.
